# RolePatch

> AI-powered resume tailoring. Score fit against a job description, rewrite bullets for the role, and prep interviews.

## Product

- [Home](https://rolepatch.com/): Product landing
- [Pricing](https://rolepatch.com/pricing): Plans and limits
- [Proof](https://rolepatch.com/proof): Evidence and outcomes
- [Evidence](https://rolepatch.com/evidence): How scoring works

## Free tools (index these)

- [Tools hub](https://rolepatch.com/tools): All free resume tools
- [Resume diff](https://rolepatch.com/tools/diff): Compare two resume versions
- [Keywords](https://rolepatch.com/tools/keywords): Job-description keyword finder
- [ATS check](https://rolepatch.com/tools/ats-check): ATS parseability check
- [Bullet check](https://rolepatch.com/tools/bullet-check): Bullet quality check
- [Word count](https://rolepatch.com/tools/word-count): Resume length tool
- [Snippets](https://rolepatch.com/tools/snippets): Resume snippet library

## Blog

- [Blog](https://rolepatch.com/blog): Career writing guides
- [Why tailoring works](https://rolepatch.com/blog/why-tailoring-resume-matters)
- [ATS scores explained](https://rolepatch.com/blog/ats-score-explained)
- [Resume keywords guide](https://rolepatch.com/blog/resume-keywords-guide)

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://rolepatch.com/api/ai): JSON inventory
- [Homepage markdown](https://rolepatch.com/index.md)
- [This index](https://rolepatch.com/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
